name: 3proxy
description: 3proxy is a lightweight multi-protocol proxy server supporting HTTP CONNECT, SOCKS4/5, POP3, SMTP, FTP, and DNS proxying from a single ~1 MB binary. Ideal for resource-constrained LXC containers.

notes.text: Credentials are generated during installation and saved to /root/3proxy.creds inside the container with chmod 600.
Default ports: HTTP 3128, SOCKS5 1080, SOCKS4 1081, POP3 1100, SMTP 8025, FTP 2121. Override via PROXY_*_PORT env vars during install.
